name: Hex Merge Puzzle
description: Hex Merge Puzzle is a clean and addictive number-merging game designed to test your logic and strategy. Drag and place number blocks onto a hexagonal grid, then merge matching numbers to create higher values and free up space. Each move matters, so think ahead and plan wisely. With smooth gameplay and a minimalist design, it’s perfect for relaxing while keeping your brain active. Easy to play but challenging to master, Hex Merge Puzzle will keep you hooked as you chase bigger numbers and higher scores.
instructions: Drag blocks onto the hex grid Match identical numbers to merge Plan moves to avoid filling the board Keep merging to reach higher numbers
